mapper.select: SELECT id, class_name, grade, description, created_at, updated_at FROM kg_class ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kg_class(class_name, grade, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{className}, #{grade}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE kg_class SET class_name = #{className}, grade = #{grade}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.class_name AS name FROM kg_resource_class rc INNER JOIN kg_class c ON c.id = rc.class_id WHERE rc.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY c.id
